title: Volunteer Communications and Storytelling
summary: Help the mission travel: turn court data, litigant journeys and contributor stories into writing, visuals and video people actually share.
body:
## The role

Change propagates through people, and people move on stories. A court that resolves disputes in 164 days instead of 600 is a story worth telling well, and there are a hundred more like it waiting in the data and the field.

[draft description, refine before publishing]

## What you'll do

- Write, design or edit: blog posts, explainers, social threads, short video
- Translate dashboards and research into things a non-lawyer shares
- Document the community: contributors, learning circles, court visits

## Who this suits

- Writers, designers, video editors, or anyone who makes complex things clear
- A few hours a week, on your own schedule

## How it works

Volunteer role, remote and flexible. Contributions are credited publicly.
